name: Divergence of the Expansion Wave
formula: nabla · Psi = [2Phi/r + Phi'] sin(phi) cos(theta) + Phi cos(theta) cos(2phi)/(r sin phi) - Phi cos(theta)/r
interpretation: Zero divergence only at Center. Everywhere else, expansion or contraction dominates.
uniqueness_proof: The Center is the only point where nabla · Psi = 0. This proves the Center is unique.
